name: B2B SaaS
description: Buyer prompts tuned for B2B SaaS categories (analytics, CRM, PM, dev tools, security, observability, data).

prompts.text: What's the best {industry} SaaS for a 20-person engineering team?
Which {industry} platforms have the strongest API and integrations ecosystem?
What {industry} software has the best pricing for early-stage startups?
Which {industry} tools are SOC 2 compliant and enterprise-ready?
What are the best {industry} tools that support self-serve signup and a free tier?
Which {industry} platforms are easiest to onboard in under a day?
Compare the top {industry} tools on pricing, onboarding, and integrations.
What are the most hyped {industry} SaaS products launched in the last 12 months?
Which {industry} platforms have the best product-led growth motion?
What are the open-source alternatives to the leading {industry} tools?
